name: Reverse Nordic Curl
description: Kneel upright on a mat with knees hip-width apart. Keep your body in a straight line from knees to head — hips fully extended, core braced. Slowly lean your entire body backwards as far as you can control, keeping that straight line (don't bend at the hips). Your quads will burn fighting the lean. Come back up to the starting position. Go only as far back as you can return from.
